title: SwiftKingdoms
description: Combination of QoL mods and Xisuma Hermitcraft modpack
body:
# SwiftKingdoms
![SwiftKingdoms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/S7UVj7HZ/images/9ad046c48956fa7d61841ca8cab5c6843a31bf45.png)

This modpack is mainly made for the SwiftKingdoms server. Keep in mind **there are bugs** and if you plan to use this modpack **its not** the **stable**st

## SERVER
I'm not publishing server version to modrinth anymore. So if you wish to play with your friends, you can create your own server version...
